title: Feed back using Paysaro
excerpt:
Im trying to get some feedback from anyone that has used Paysaro.  We are concidering using the app but can’t seem to find any reviews or speak with anyone that has used it. 
Thanks 
Chris

posts.author: Shoreline (Chris Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im trying to get some feedback from anyone that has used Paysaro. We are concidering using the app but can’t seem to find any reviews or speak with anyone that has used it.

Thanks

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Shoreline,

Alfred here from Kolaai, creators of the Paysaro app.
The app has a free 14 days trial which you use to try out the app.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: Shoreline (Chris Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Alfred, thank you for the response. I appreciate your time to respond.

Thanks

Chris
